description: Every TicketData price signal for any event, performer, or venue, plus a local price-history store for trend math, drift alerts, and cross-event comparisons no ticket tool ships.

novel_features.name: Watchlist management
novel_features.description: Track a set of events locally so one sync re-fetches all their current prices.

novel_features.name: Watchlist price board
novel_features.description: One sortable table of every watched event: get-in price, N-day change, forecast direction, and where today sits in its own history.

novel_features.name: Drift and target alerts
novel_features.description: Diff the two most recent snapshots per watched event, flag floors that moved past a threshold, and fire price-target hits.

novel_features.name: History stats and best time to buy
novel_features.description: Historical low/high, median, current percentile, volatility, and the weekday the floor is typically lowest, from the local price series.

novel_features.name: Cross-event comparison
novel_features.description: Rank multiple watched events, or all of one performer's watched events, by get-in price and percent change.

novel_features.name: Best-zone opportunity finder
novel_features.description: Rank an event's zones by current get-in price and by each zone's drop versus its own history to surface the underpriced section.

novel_features.name: Offline multi-result search
novel_features.description: Local full-text search across synced events, performers, and venues, returning multiple matches.
